Package sailpoint.connector

Class TimeoutException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • sailpoint.tools.AbstractLocalizableException
          • sailpoint.connector.ConnectorException
            • sailpoint.connector.ConnectionFailedException
              • sailpoint.connector.TimeoutException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, sailpoint.tools.Localizable
    public class TimeoutException
extends ConnectionFailedException
    TimeoutException thrown when the managed system does not respond and number of attempts to connect are failed. TimeoutException is extended from ConnectionFailedException. This class will entertain the message string, Message object and throwable object.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      TimeoutException()
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by the connector components to throw an exception.
      TimeoutException​(java.lang.String message)
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the message String.
      TimeoutException​(java.lang.String error, java.lang.String suggestion, java.lang.Throwable t)
      Create a new TimeoutException from an error text, suggestion text and existing exception.
      TimeoutException​(java.lang.String message, java.lang.Throwable t)
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object and message string.
      TimeoutException​(java.lang.Throwable t)
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object.
      TimeoutException​(Message message)
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the Message object.
      TimeoutException​(Message message, java.lang.Throwable t)
      TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object and Message object.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException()
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by the connector components to throw an exception.

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(java.lang.String message)
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the message String.
        Parameters:
        message - String message can be provided at the time of invoking the constructor.

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(java.lang.Throwable t)
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object.
        Parameters:
        t - Throwable t object can be provided at the time of invoking the constructor.

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(java.lang.String message,
                        java.lang.Throwable t)
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object and message string.
        Parameters:
        message - This String parameter can be provided at the time of calling following constructor.
        t - Throwable object can be provided at the time of calling following constructor.

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(Message message)
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the Message object.
        Parameters:
        message - Message object can be provided at the time of calling following constructor

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(Message message,
                        java.lang.Throwable t)
        TimeoutException constructor will be called by passing the throwable object and Message object.
        Parameters:
        message - Message object can be provided at the time of calling following constructor.
        t - Throwable object t can be provided at the time of calling following constructor.

      • TimeoutException

        public TimeoutException​(java.lang.String error,
                        java.lang.String suggestion,
                        java.lang.Throwable t)
        Create a new TimeoutException from an error text, suggestion text and existing exception.

        The error and suggestion being set here is used later to prepare well formatted exception message based on resource bundle key 'msg_with_suggestion' and 'msg_no_suggestion'.

        Parameters:
        error - ResourceBundle message key, or a plain text message containing error details.
        suggestion - ResourceBundle message key, or a plain text message containing hints to solve the error.
        t - Throwable object t can be provided at the time of calling following constructor.
